title: Reflective mulch + soap spray for onion thrips — Tamil Nadu practice
body: In Tamil Nadu onion plots, thrips (Thrips tabaci) populations are suppressed with a two-layer IPM approach: silvered reflective polythene mulch between rows disorients incoming adults, and a fortnightly foliar spray of 1% neem-oil plus 0.1% insecticidal soap targets nymphs in the leaf axils. This keeps thrips below economic threshold without relying on broad-spectrum pesticides that kill Orius predators. The practice is most cost-effective when adopted before flowering initiation and is paired with drip irrigation to keep foliage dry.

body_translated.en: In Tamil Nadu onion plots, thrips (Thrips tabaci) populations are suppressed with a two-layer IPM approach: silvered reflective polythene mulch between rows disorients incoming adults, and a fortnightly foliar spray of 1% neem-oil plus 0.1% insecticidal soap targets nymphs in the leaf axils. This keeps thrips below economic threshold without relying on broad-spectrum pesticides that kill Orius predators. The practice is most cost-effective when adopted before flowering initiation and is paired with drip irrigation to keep foliage dry.
body_translated.si: තමිල් නාඩු ලූණු ක්ෂේත්‍රවල thrips (Thrips tabaci) සංඛ්‍යා දෙ-ස්ථර IPM ප්‍රවේශයකින් යටපත් කරනු ලැබේ: පේළි අතර රිදී වර්ණ පරාවර්තක පොලිතීන් ආවරණය පැමිණෙන වැඩිහිටියන් දිශාව නැතිකරන අතර, සෑම සති දෙකට වරක් 1% නීම් තෙල් සහ 0.1% කෘමිනාශක සබන් මිශ්‍රණයක් පත්‍ර මුල් නිමිණුරු තිබෙන ළැපළු (nymphs) ඉලක්ක කර ඉසියි. මෙය Orius පරභක්ෂකයන් මරන පුළුල් වර්ණාවලි කෘමිනාශකවලට යොමු නොවී thrips ආර්ථික සීමාවට පහළින් තබා ගනී. මල් පිපීම ආරම්භයට පෙර මෙම පිළිවෙත අනුගමනය කිරීමෙන් වඩාත්ම ලාභදායී වන අතර පත්‍ර වියළි තබා ගැනීමට බිංදු වාරි මාර්ග සමඟ යුගල කෙරේ.
body_translated.ta: தமிழ்நாட்டு வெங்காய பாத்திகளில், thrips (Thrips tabaci) எண்ணிக்கைகள் இரு-அடுக்கு IPM அணுகுமுறையால் அடக்கப்படுகின்றன: வரிசைகளுக்கு இடையே வெள்ளி-பிரதிபலிப்பு பாலித்தீன் மல்ச் வரும் வயதானவற்றை திசைமாற்றுகிறது, மற்றும் இரு-வாரம் ஒருமுறை 1% வேப்ப-எண்ணெய் மற்றும் 0.1% பூச்சிக்கொல்லி சோப்பு இலை-கணு ஆக்சில்களில் உள்ள நிம்ஃப்களை இலக்காகக் கொள்கிறது. இது Orius வேட்டையாடிகளைக் கொல்லும் பரந்த-வரம்பு பூச்சிக்கொல்லிகளை நம்பாமல் thrips-ஐ பொருளாதார வரம்பிற்குக் கீழே வைத்திருக்கிறது. மலர்ச்சி தொடக்கத்திற்கு முன் இந்த நடைமுறை ஏற்றுக்கொள்ளப்படும்போது மிகவும் செலவு-திறமையானது, மற்றும் இலைகளை உலர்வாக வைத்திருக்க சொட்டு நீர்ப்பாசனத்துடன் இணைக்கப்படுகிறது.

quote: Silvered plastic mulch reduces thrips colonization by up to 60% in onion plots; weekly neem+soap sprays complement the cultural barrier.

field_provenance.caveat: Tamil Nadu practice; not yet validated on Sri Lanka dry-zone soils or against local thrips races. Render as 'promising practice' with the regional badge; do not use for chemical dosing without a DOA agronomist sign-off.
